overview.name: Raw Payload
overview.description:
This scenario verifies API support for raw request payload.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with inline raw JSON body and verify response status = 201. 2. Extract created entity ID from response. 3. Send GET request by ID and verify response status = 200. 4. Validate response body matches created entity.
This scenario validates: - Raw request body processing - Entity creation from inline JSON payload - Entity retrieval by ID - Response body consistency

http.comment: Step 6-7. Send POST request with raw body and verify response = 201
Step 8-10. Send GET request and validate created entity from raw payload
